series_metadata.series_title: Managed Care Plan & Enhanced Care Management
series_metadata.series_description: Record contains specific files related to each Managed Care plan (MCP) and the monitoring of services provided to Medicaid recipients as part of the plan. may include MCP program operating and reimbursement documents, Request For Proposals(RFP), listings of providers involved in the MCP; enrollment eligibility information; rate setting documents; wavier request; quality assurance audit reviews; financial reports; capitation reports; historical data; grievance information (SACMS evaluations), encounter data and Just Cause requests from recipients to change MCPs.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office and 5 years in records center ; Electronic: in office and 5 years in records center
